title: PSD.rb Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for PSD.rb commands and usage patterns

commands.description: Parse a PSD file and output its structure
commands.scenario: Use when you need to inspect the structure of a PSD file

commands.description: Export layers of a PSD file to a specified folder
commands.scenario: Use when you need to extract all layers from a PSD file

commands.description: Display basic information about a PSD file
commands.scenario: Use when you need quick details about a PSD file

commands.description: Extract a specific layer from a PSD file to an image
commands.scenario: Use when you need to save a specific layer as an image

commands.description: List all layers in a PSD file
commands.scenario: Use when you need to see all layers in a PSD file

commands.description: Merge all layers of a PSD file into a single image
commands.scenario: Use when you need a flattened version of a PSD file

commands.description: Resize a PSD file to new dimensions
commands.scenario: Use when you need to change the dimensions of a PSD file

commands.description: Convert a PSD file to another image format
commands.scenario: Use when you need to convert a PSD to a JPEG

commands.description: Compress a PSD file to reduce its size
commands.scenario: Use when you need to reduce the file size of a PSD

commands.description: Compare two PSD files for differences
commands.scenario: Use when you need to find differences between two PSD files

commands.description: Extract metadata from a PSD file
commands.scenario: Use when you need to access metadata information of a PSD

commands.description: Attempt to repair a corrupted PSD file
commands.scenario: Use when you need to fix a corrupted PSD file
